modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding automatic captions from YouTube to Panopto video

full_description_text:  
So, I was chatting with someone who wanted to know how to add those automatic captions from YouTube to their Panopto video. They seemed a bit confused about the steps and what to do next. It’s like they just couldn’t figure it out during our live chat.
short_description: Trouble adding automatic captions from YouTube to Panopto video
description: So, I was chatting with someone who wanted to know how to add those automatic captions from YouTube to their Panopto video. They seemed a bit confused about the steps and what to do next. It’s like they just couldn’t figure it out during our live chat.
